backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing career prediction API with role-based access control, user profile management, and a mock career prediction endpoint that returns hardcoded strengths, weaknesses, career paths, and advice.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including Internet Identity authentication, chat interface, modern design with warm color scheme, and logo integration with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components for authentication, chat interface, profile management, landing page, and styling with warm amber/orange color palette.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes using neutral grayscale and warm accent colors, avoiding blue and purple tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference for the React application titled 'AI Career Prediction Chatbot'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, conditional rendering of landing page vs authenticated interface, and profile setup modal flow for new users.
frontend/src/components/ChatInput.tsx: Textarea-based chat input component with send button, Enter key submission support, and disabled state handling during message processing.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Main chat UI managing message state, displaying conversation history with auto-scroll, welcome screen with suggestion cards, and integrating career prediction API calls.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Individual message bubble component rendering user or AI messages with avatars, timestamps, markdown-style formatting, and loading states.
frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx: Unauthenticated landing page with hero section, logo, value proposition, login CTA, feature cards highlighting AI career guidance benefits, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with logo/branding, login button, main content area, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that toggles between login/logout states using Internet Identity, with loading states and error handling for re-authentication.
frontend/src/components/Logo.tsx: Simple logo component that displays the CareerVision AI logo image with configurable size (sm/md/lg).
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user onboarding that collects the user's name and saves it to their profile, with non-dismissible overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state changes and initializing access control with admin token from URL params.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook to fetch the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, with loading states synchronized to actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCareerPredictio: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend to generate career predictions based on a user's question string.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook to save user profile data to the backend and invalidate the profile cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space for the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: TypeScript type definitions for chat messages and career prediction response structure with strengths, weaknesses, career paths, and advice fields.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Lexend), border radius utilities, shadows, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for an AI career prediction chatbot with Internet Identity authentication, tracking implemented features (authentication, chat interface, frontend design, logo integration) and pending backend AI prediction logic. Built with React/TypeScript frontend and Motoko backend on Internet Computer.
